positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_vampire_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    space != duster).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    sucks(space)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~is_a(X0,vacuum_class) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    is_a(space,vacuum_class)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~is_a(X0,plunger_class) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~is_a(X0,vampire_class) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~sucks(duster)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    is_a(duster,household_appliance_class)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~is_a(space,vampire_class)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
